data.body: Cycle: 513 submit 409'd (Gerrit REST rebase results lag -> 'rebased' changes weren't actually on tip). Rebased all 5 remaining (509 513 515 517 518) onto current tip 1f3a61c4 (519 merge); all CI-ing. 515 now rebases clean (earlier runbook conflict resolved). 7/10 bugs done. Next: submit each green-on-tip serially. Remaining: 509(#1) 513(#3) 515(#9) 517(#6) 518(#8) + 3b4e test follow-up.
